ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_type" TEXT /* Type of the department (e.g., Forest, Soil Conservation) */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "position_type" TEXT /* Type of the position (e.g., Cadre, SDR) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the position belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "pay_scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pay scale associated with the position */,
  "grade_pay" INTEGER /* Grade pay for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each posting */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being posted */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee is posted to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position the employee is posted to */,
  "date_of_posting_from" TEXT /* Date the posting starts */,
  "date_of_posting_to" TEXT /* Date the posting ends */,
  "posthold" TEXT /* Position held during the posting */,
  "posting_type" TEXT /* Type of posting (e.g., regular, deputation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postings_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postings_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_scales" (
  "pay_scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay scale */,
  "pay_scale" TEXT /* Pay scale range */,
  "grade_pay" INTEGER /* Grade pay */,
  "basic_pay" INTEGER /* Basic pay */,
  "allowances" INTEGER /* Allowances */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pay_scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pay_scale_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pay scale history entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "pay_scale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pay scale */,
  "date_of_scale" TEXT /* Date the pay scale was applied */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the pay scale change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pay_scale_history_pay_scale_id FOREIGN KEY ("pay_scale_id") REFERENCES pay_scales ("pay_scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_records" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee taking leave */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., sick, annual) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the performance review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals set for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotion_history" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being promoted */,
  "new_position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new position */,
  "promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the promotion */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the promotion */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., regular, ad-hoc) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotion_history_new_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting approval */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of the request (e.g., promotion, leave, pay scale change) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the approver */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  "request_details" TEXT /* Details of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of the action (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "entity_affected" TEXT /* Entity affected by the action (e.g., employee, department, position) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity affected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_logs" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sender */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the email */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the email was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the email (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "email_type" TEXT /* Type of email (e.g., notification, reminder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_logs_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_logs_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_suggestions" (
  "suggestion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suggestion */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee providing the suggestion */,
  "suggestion_date" TEXT /* Date the suggestion was provided */,
  "suggestion_text" TEXT /* Text of the suggestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suggestion_id")
)
